textByHashes.6ed99336f028eb1faf3bd3e680296514f6adf038: That would be me sir. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.0c67de2698b378b3df8f8aed2e02bf6209253517: That would be me miss. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.35c33aedceff364338479968a2b8e9fb75a9f585: Stop right there sir. You can tell Willow she can do the heavy lifting herself.
textByHashes.a3c3b722fe2599b1eeb980889a55cb50f3af6e61: Stop right there miss. You can tell Willow she can do the heavy lifting herself.
textByHashes.2e7a9d87d5c54909505504e4f4dadaa4660509b1: Willow does not appreciate the amount of work that goes into building my physique. I would not help her lift a shrimp.
textByHashes.848ccca3fc46fcd09e0e12eddd7f3f6dc3bef210: I take great pride in these muscles and it hurts me to the core to hear such insults!
textByHashes.b6426c41a7fe3fa74fcedd051a34d4fedfe1d903: Archaeological digsite? Why is Willow interested in starting a digsite?
textByHashes.55919707a8838f08590980799b28bdc9eb05b00c: Ah that makes sense. [sigh] You poor lad...
textByHashes.0758099b1f392b85c0e59ff0b3dc14537b0bd4cc: Ah that makes sense. [sigh] You poor lass...
textByHashes.10ef774467475891ae6eaae44ac2acb36850c0f2: Nothing. Look, I will help you. But first you must prove your strength to me.
textByHashes.8cfc353c669f75b581f9d64cbc3245d9decdee08: Hmm... I will see about that.
textByHashes.beef452d267768bbea096f3c6d2a1b8a66af2a1c: Yes... you do have tremendous muscle mass.
textByHashes.7ffa08dda1f122b89edab293fbaf0ca68acd42e9: Your legs are strong as steel, too.
textByHashes.ae10d4fee6a34cbee80e195a139cf0b9a80b2903: Well , I have to say you are the definition of strength.
textByHashes.c129fd5fefa3338d9b6584a0f9834b4edcd948c1: But a strongman doesn't stop when they reach the top. They always push themselves.
textByHashes.3e6d8b83bd0f255c3fae6047583f8d3018f2a434: But a strongwoman doesn't stop when they reach the top. They always push themselves.
textByHashes.c8588fb578bfc2649db41e3e2df913f5cc0e6335: That is true. But are you strong in both body and mind?
textByHashes.5127f4097eefef53a6ccb5fe5562c47df43611ba: To be a true strongman, you do not just need big muscles. No, you must have self control and an unrelenting desire to push yourself to become stronger.
textByHashes.d98ab64cee405eb491057bf8d22435d368d04582: To be a true strongwoman, you do not just need big muscles. No, you must have self control and an unrelenting desire to push yourself to become stronger.
textByHashes.10e65325f033af0eb1f2bcc1377450af1cbec020: I would ask you to train with my old friend and trainer, Atlas, one of the strongest barbarians I know. You can find him in the hall north of here.
textByHashes.f4e9eae9e49ca3e71b8ae572abc3d51aa26ac4a7: If you can survive his rigorous training program, I shall offer you my help.
textByHashes.ccbca437ee9eddc32b5213c09e4c8a71e04ce600: Tell him I sent you and he will train you.
textByHashes.b470563db742faa471e1dd5592ae20e440459dfd: Atlas can be found in the hall to the north of us.
textByHashes.a2c147973b81696b62654b7e847d206600a460d3: So have you completed your training session with Atlas?
textByHashes.2646cd278bc177c1710a550298a8a038876efa7b: It always is, but I can see you are standing taller and looking stronger already.
textByHashes.16b5a937524b5f7a4d52d651c38ab8aeb71d4ff7: Now, show me your muscles and I will judge if you're ready to receive my help.
textByHashes.858942849c6da6ea9ef5ad3d88ad668c0f468731: My goodness, those muscles are exquisite. I will definitely help a man who shows that much dedication to their physique.
textByHashes.7b9b2c57a2e34cbb083f20c27ac530ccc48a1ee6: My goodness, those muscles are exquisite. I will definitely help a lady who shows that much dedication to their physique.
textByHashes.5c1d4b159586986bf60a7a7d3acb0700f2d8a5d1: Thank you my friend, I will meet you there.
textByHashes.0e8d7ebd23bbd53ab7c347080587155586a67c63: I want you to prove your strength by showing me your muscles!
textByHashes.d87de62a373c2ba26109a6addcac9fd659004105: Should not be a problem. This challenge is easy for a strongman.
textByHashes.deedf3488c259f98559fe39bdb44c11e13ae3b79: Should not be a problem. This challenge is easy for a strongwoman.
textByHashes.bcbcabbeb2f2545ee67b741a7ebf42f8112f0534: Do not worry my friend. If you stay dedicated and keep working everyday, you'll be able to achieve anything you dream of.
textByHashes.e6c507f48b8c50932057a710ee3c77c26ba9b56d: One last thing - be careful when we go inside. You never know what will happen.
textByHashes.e2dab1c806c882dfefd75b4308759a0db00edb17: That was a tad too explosive I think.
textByHashes.b3f8d57c72c7437266280ae2bc4531c9d31c461c: Of course ma'am, I will get to work.
textByHashes.87bcfa06f5fe805afdfc6842ab45d4e00a745ada: The work is done, Willow. My apologies if it took too long.
textByHashes.9257302afbf731dce831237a3ccd34bf6771f01d: I'm a muscle man, not a fighter.
textByHashes.c5fba4531d37f3953edf58c4e8dc937d8e746a8d: , I am so glad to see you are safe.
textByHashes.39f8badfae778142e48da46482ed3691411115f9: I am sorry . I do respect you and your love for the muscle. But sadly I needed the money. These muscles don't pay the bills on their own.
textByHashes.905c50660b3a8954cb45ff9ba81a078802a074cb: Please do not let this incident divert you from your path of becoming a strongman! I truly believe in you.
textByHashes.89166fe6bf4785f9d21ef960d8b31a36797d2b9f: Please do not let this incident divert you from your path of becoming a strongwoman! I truly believe in you.
textByHashes.ff8dde1d5cb65c590026caa8c102c57e7a595ca3: You best not be here to start any trouble sir.
textByHashes.0b5a1a27cfafc9beb85032cea8df30b34c5f25e2: You best not be here to start any trouble miss.
